name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyFastscan
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyFastscan
syntax: long coTfsLssAddMasterResponseIdentifyFastscan( dword idNumber, dword idNumberMask, dword bitCheck, dword bitCheckMask, dword sub, dword subMask, dword next, dword nextMask );
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions and sends a response if a request is received.

parameters.name: idNumberMask
parameters.description: Mask for FastScan ID; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: bitCheck
parameters.description: FastScan bitcheck value, used to define the used bitmask for LSS FastScan.

parameters.name: bitCheckMask
parameters.description: Bitmask for LSS FastScan; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: sub
parameters.description: FastScan sub, defines which part of the LSS-ID is transmitted in idNumber 0 - vendor-ID1 - product code2 - revision number3 - serial number

parameters.name: subMask
parameters.description: Mask for FastScan sub; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

parameters.name: next
parameters.description: FastScan next, specifies the sub for the next request.

parameters.name: nextMask
parameters.description: Mask for FastScan next; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
